title: Create Unity Security Scan Integration Panel
description: Build a dedicated panel for triggering and viewing Unity (Shannon) pentest scans. Display scan configuration options, progress indicator during scan, and results with severity-colored findings. Support exporting scan reports. Integrate with existing Unity CLI or API.
acceptance_criteria: Unity panel accessible from sidebar with shield icon
Scan configuration: target selection, scan type dropdown
Start Scan button triggers Unity subprocess via IPC
Progress bar shows scan phases with estimated completion
Results table shows findings with severity (critical/high/medium/low)
Color coding: red (critical), orange (high), yellow (medium), blue (low)
Finding detail expands to show description, remediation
Export button generates PDF or JSON report
History tab shows past scan results
agent_output: UnityPanel with code/live/greenlight scan types, findings display with severity coloring, security score visualization, scan history list.
